# Romagna Short Stay

> Curated directory of apartments, B&Bs and holiday homes in Romagna, Italy — from Cesena to Rimini, from the Romagna hills to the Adriatic Riviera. Verified properties, direct booking on Airbnb.

## Directory

- [Homepage EN](https://www.romagna-short-stay.com/): Short rentals Romagna, holiday apartments Emilia-Romagna
- [Homepage IT](https://www.romagna-affitti-brevi.it/): Affitti brevi Romagna, appartamenti vacanze Emilia-Romagna

## Location

- Corso Garibaldi, Cesena FC, 47521, Italy
- Coordinates: 44.1396, 12.2431
- Area served: Emilia-Romagna — Cesena, Rimini, Forli, Ravenna, Cesenatico, Cervia, Romagna hills

## Contact

- Tel: +39 392 520 0650
- Email: luceacollection@gmail.com

## Properties in directory

- Holiday apartments with fully equipped kitchen
- B&Bs and short-term rooms
- Villas and holiday homes for families
- Agriturismi in the Romagna hills

## Areas covered

- Adriatic coast: Rimini, Cesenatico, Cervia, Riccione
- Romagna hills: Bertinoro, Longiano, Meldola, Predappio
- Art cities: Ravenna, Cesena, Forli
- Inland: medieval villages Forli-Cesena
